items.title: How to pay?
items.question: How to pay?
items.answer:
Please tell me your order. I will tell you the price of the item, the shipping cost, the original box fee and the total amount.
We accept Western Union, Wise via SWIFT, bank transfer and USDT cryptocurrency as payment methods. A 30% deposit is required, and the remaining 70% shall be paid before delivery. We will send you product photos and videos for your confirmation prior to shipment.

items.title: Quality Problem
items.question: What If There's A Quality Problem?
items.answer: We offer a 30-day quality guarantee. If there are any manufacturing defects, we'll repair or replace your piece at no extra cost.

items.title: What If The Product Is Out Of Stock?
items.question: What If The Product Is Out Of Stock?
items.answer: We will submit the order, and you will need to pay a 50% down payment. The production time is about 7 to 12 days. But some style need more time. with diamond or with nature stone or style is difficult,Will take more than 12days,please give us more time,we will try best to make. To ensure the quality of the jewelry.

items.title: How To Know The Price?
items.question: How To Know The Price?
items.answer: We are a direct jewelry manufacturer and offer all customers prices close to wholesale rates. This means our profit margin is very low. Since the costs of gold and diamonds fluctuate daily, the prices shown on the website are only for reference.So welcome to chat with us on Whatsapp ,Message or Telegram. Send the picture directly and we will reply you asap. It is also ok for you to send Email for us. We are online 24h.

items.title: Do You Provide Brand Box & Package?
items.question: Do You Provide Brand Box & Package?
items.answer: Yes, we offer free original packaging and certificate, but need US$100 for shipping cost.

items.title: How Can I Confirm The Quality?
items.question: How Can I Confirm The Quality?
items.answer: Before we prepare to send, we will take photos and video to confirm with you.

items.title: Can I Get More Pictures Or Videos?
items.question: Can I Get More Pictures Or Videos?
items.answer: Welcome to chat with our customer service and they will take more picture for you.

items.title: Is This Personal Or Wholesale?
items.question: Is This Personal Or Wholesale?
items.answer: In fact, we have served many clients from all over the world. You can order highÃ¢ÂÂquality branded jewelry for yourself, your family and friends. If you are a jewelry distributor, even better. Place bulk orders each time, and weÃ¢ÂÂll offer you a better price, plus free delivery and original branded packaging.

items.title: Do You Ship Worldwide?
items.question: Do You Ship Worldwide?
items.answer:
Yes,we will calculate the actual shipping cost according to your country.
We offer free worldwide tracked delivery on all orders. We partner with professional shipping carriers to safely deliver your items straight to your door. Once the package is handed over to the carrier, delivery typically takes 5–7 business days. Please note that remote areas may experience longer transit times.

items.title: Delivery Time
items.question: How Long Is The Delivery Time?
items.answer: Production takes 7-15 days. Shipping varies by destination: 7-14 days express, 20-30 days standard. We'll provide tracking information.
